stonetop.summary: Hound-sized spiders that paralyze and cocoon their prey.

system.concept: Hound-sized spiders that paralyze and cocoon their prey.
system.description: So far, these hound-sized spiders have thankfully avoided hunters and trappers in the Wood, and certainly haven't come near town. But they're out there, rest assured, and growing in numbers.

lore.prompt: **Something interesting:** Nailadd venom paralyzes prey, rather than killing it.
**Something useful:** You can harvest the venom (d4 uses, dangerous, reload, Value 1) from an intact corpse. A blade coated in nailadd venom deals +1d4 damage and numbs the wounded area.
